title: Hariota ramulosa
benefits: Hariota ramulosa, also known as the hairy cap moss or hairy rock moss, is a type of non-vascular plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits. The plant is believed to have antimicrobial properties, which may help to combat infections and promote wound healing. Additionally, Hariota ramulosa may have anti-inflammatory properties, which could help to reduce swelling and alleviate pain. The plant is also thought to have antioxidant properties, which may help to protect the body from oxidative stress and cell damage. More research is needed to confirm the potential health benefits of Hariota ramulosa.
